2604.08042.title: 3DrawAgent: Teaching LLM to Draw in 3D with Early Contrastive Experience
2604.08042.paper_summary: Sketching in 3D space enables expressive reasoning about shape, structure, and spatial relationships, yet generating 3D sketches through natural language remains a major challenge. In this work, we introduce 3DrawAgent, a training-free, language-driven framework for 3D sketch generation that leverages large language models (LLMs) to sequentially draw 3D Bezier curves under geometric feedback. Unlike prior 2D sketch agents, our method introduces a relative experience optimization strategy that adapts the recently proposed Group Reward Policy Optimization (GRPO) paradigm. Instead of relying on explicit ground-truth supervision, we construct pairwise comparisons among generated sketches, with each pair consisting of a relatively better and a worse result based on CLIP-based perceptual rewards and LLM-based fine-grained qualitative assessment. These experiences are then used to iteratively refine the prior knowledge of 3D drawing, enabling black-box reinforcement of the model's 3D awareness. This design allows our model to self-improve its spatial understanding and drawing quality without parameter updates. Experiments show that 3DrawAgent can generate complex and coherent 3D Bezier sketches from diverse textual prompts, exhibit emergent geometric reasoning, and generalize to novel shapes, establishing a new paradigm for advancing the field of training-free 3D sketch intelligence.
2604.08042.paper_summary_zh: 在三維空間中進行草圖繪製使得對形狀、結構和空間關係的表達性推理成為可能，但通過自然語言生成三維草圖仍然是一大挑戰。在這項工作中，我們介紹了3DrawAgent，一個無需訓練的、以語言驅動的三維草圖生成框架，利用大型語言模型（LLMs）在幾何反饋下順序繪製三維貝茲曲線。與以往的2D草圖代理不同，我們的方法引入了一種相對經驗優化策略，適應了最近提出的群體獎勵政策優化（GRPO）範式。我們不依賴明確的真實監督，而是構建生成草圖之間的成對比較，每對由一個相對較好和一個較差的結果組成，這基於基於CLIP的感知獎勵和基於LLM的細緻質量評估。這些經驗然後用於迭代地細化三維繪圖的先前知識，使模型的三維意識得到黑箱強化。這一設計使我們的模型能夠在不進行參數更新的情況下自我提升其空間理解和繪圖質量。實驗表明，3DrawAgent可以從多樣的文本提示中生成複雜且連貫的三維貝茲草圖，展現出新興的幾何推理，並能夠對新形狀進行泛化，為推進無需訓練的三維草圖智能領域建立了一個新的範式。
2604.08042.author: Hongcan Xiao et.al.
2604.08042.authors: Hongcan Xiao, Xinyue Xiao, Yilin Wang, Yue Zhang, Yonggang Qi
